title: nageia drouyniana
intro: Nageia drouyniana, also known as Drouyn's nageia, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nageia drouyniana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Nageia drouyniana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
